message:
fix(security): proper slot ID overflow handling and secure zeroization

Security improvements from code review:

key_management.rs:
- Use checked_add(1) instead of saturating_add(1) for slot ID assignment
  to properly error when max slot ID (255) is reached instead of creating
  duplicate IDs
- Fix DEK zeroization: make old_dek mutable and zeroize it directly
  (previous code created a copy and zeroized the copy due to array Copy
  semantics). Also zeroize new_dek before scope exit.
- Move DecryptionEngine import to test module where it's actually used

qr.rs:
- Use zeroize crate for secure erasure of RecoverySecret bytes
  (manual loop may be optimized away by compiler)
- Add zeroization of encoded base64 string which also contains
  the sensitive secret data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
